content.title: Support aggregated notifications for subagents to prevent LLM hallucinations
content.excerpt:
### Problem / Motivation

### Description
Currently, `SubagentManager` delivers subagent execution results to the main agent in real-time via `_announce_result()` as soon as each individual subagent finishes. While this provides low latency, it introduces a significant risk of LLM hallucination when a single session spawns multiple subagents.

When the first subagent completes and injects its result into the chat history, the main LLM is re-triggered mid-turn. Depending on the model's capability
